channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Calls for Firing of McConnell Aide
item.description: President Donald Trump demanded the immediate dismissal of a staffer who made Senator Mitch McConnell appear foolish and out of touch.

item.title: House Republican Misses Another Week of Votes Amid Health Absence
item.description: Rep. Tom Kean Jr. has been absent from Congress for over two months due to an unspecified health issue, with his office indicating he will return soon.

item.title: FDA Doctors Linked Child Deaths to COVID Vaccines, Biden Admin Stayed Silent
Platner Once Dismissed PTSD as Excuse, Now Cites It for Online Controversies
item.description: Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner previously called PTSD no excuse for bad behavior, but now uses the condition to explain his offensive social media posts.
